hook.name: NFTStrategyHook
hook.description: Manages ETH/token pools for NFTStrategy NFT collections on Uniswap v4. Takes a time-decreasing buy fee (starting at 99%, decreasing 100 bps/minute to a floor of 10%) and a fixed 10% sell fee via afterSwapReturnsDelta, distributing proceeds 80% to the NFT collection, 10% to a protocol token buyback, and 10% to a fee address.
